title: SiGREEN | Siemens
body: CARBON FOOTPRINT DATA SiGREEN - Product carbon footprint management Gain transparency and reduce manual processes in emission management with SiGREEN. Easy to set up and use, this web-based app provides you with dynamic product carbon footprint (PCF) data and enhanced sustainability credentials that build trust with stakeholders and give you a competitive edge. Contact us Try SiGREEN app for free Register for free to optimize your carbon footprint reduction management. Learn more DYNAMIC, VERIFIABLE DATA Drive fast and impactful carbon reduction efforts SiGREEN provides dynamic, verifiable PCF data in a web-based app. Easy to implement and use Accepted by suppliers Compliant with all relevant industry standards: Catena-X, TfS, ISO, PACT Reduces highly manual processes in emission management Helps you identify and address hidden emissions Gives access and simplifies communication with an ecosystem of solutions and partners Provides a competitive edge with enhanced sustainability credentials Maps values directly to the respective components, clearly identifying information sources and indicating missing data Helps build trust with your stakeholders through transparent and accurate emission data PCF management with SIGREEN For more detailed insights into how to use SiGREEN to track emissions in your supply chain and production process, watch our on-demand webinar. Watch Frequently asked questions What are the buying options for SiGREEN? There are several options for starting your journey with SiGREEN. You can contact us at any time — our team is here to support you with implementation onboarding, training and supplier enablement. SiGREEN FREE Free, easy-to-use app to start your PCF management and get suppliers to respond to your PCF requests. Multi-PCF-standard compliance (ISO, TIS, Catena-X, PACT) Unlimited users, suppliers, products and components CBAM module for exporters Online training resources SiGREEN ADVANCED The multi-network upgrade to exchange PCF. It includes the technical connectivity required to exchange PCF via the Catena-X and PACT data exchange networks. Includes in addition to SiGREEN FREE: Catena X - EDC as a Service PACT interface Bulk uploads SiGREEN PREMIUM Enhances efficiency through APIs, advanced role management and further mass handling features. Includes in addition to SiGREEN ADVANCED: Basic API Package for integration with e.g. ERP and PLM systems Customizable roles and permissions Bulk download SiGREEN ENTERPRISE The most advanced SiGREEN configured to your specific needs with options like automation via API and gate-to-gate emission metering. Includes in addition to SiGREEN PREMIUM (selection): Designated Catena-X EDC CBAM module for importers Remote API package Shopfloor connectivity Discover how the SiGREEN product carbon footprint tool works and how you can start managing your PCF – risk and hassle free. What features does SiGREEN include? Centralized customer requests: Easily receive specific PCF requests from customers, including product location and PCF format, and map them to your product portfolio. Simplifying the process of responding to customer requests. Comprehensive supply chain management: Gain transparency on the carbon footprint of each item in your supply chain and the status of their carbon data. Identify high-impact items and collaborate with suppliers to improve PCF data. Gate-to-gate emission tracking: Add your own process emissions to your PCFs using a webform or API integration. Suitable for companies with significant emissions or a large number of products. Provides flexibility and accuracy in calculating PCFs. Third-party verification: Request and prove third-party verification of product carbon footprints. Useful for critical products and enhances trust in PCF data. Flexible data sharing: Easily share PCF data with customers in response to requests or proactively. Helps meet legislative requirements and supports customers in their decarbonization efforts. What is the CBAM Module? The CBAM module offers full CBAM process compliance for importers and exporters. It includes: Dedicated CBAM module for EU importers to manage CBAM process compliance Easy interface for non-EU suppliers to respond to customer’s CBAM requests for free Automated creation of XML export for fast submission to EU CBAM portal History and proof-log of supplier communication exportable to EU commission and local authorities Dashboard for CBAM cost implication and smart sourcing decision making Learn more by reading our white paper. What are additional or optional features of SiGREEN? AI Emission Estimator Access to emission databases with AI-based automated mapping to emission factors AI-based fast and easy emission estimations with secondary data Integrated SiGREEN functionality to access more than 30 emission databases with one-click, including ecoinvent Automatically identify the most suitable emission factor for components by leveraging AI capabilities Fill in data gaps for individual components or entire products with secondary data Use average emission values to compare with and assess supplier feedback Catena-X and EDC services Get easy access to Catena-X with full connectivity-as-a-service including EDC. SiGREEN is a Catena-X certified solution and will enable you to exchange PCF data via the Catena-X data ecosystem. You will gain access to: Catena-X data model Catena-X related user support, e.g. Catena-X rulebook access Connectivity to PCF calculation tools EDC and full connectivity-as-a-service Custom connectivity Watch our webinar or read the white paper to learn how SiGREEN helps you get started with Catena-X. SiGREEN for PACT Get PACT compatibility and sharing. Manage, aggregate and exchange PCFs in line with the PACT standard. Upload and manage PACT compliant PCFs Aggregate PCFs using the PACT standard Exchange PACT compatible PCFs through the PACT network or the SiGREEN network Exchange PCFs compatible with PACT 3.0 (expected for Q1/25) SiGREEN APIs Our APIs make your PCF Management with SiGREEN even more efficient. BasicAPI-Package: Easily integrate SiGREEN into your system landscape and exchange data with software for Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP), Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) and Lifycycle Assessment (LCA) RemoteAPI-Package: Provides easy integration of SiGREEN into automated workflows in combination with other tools. Get integrated control over SiGREEN capabilities into your IT tools and trigger actions remotely. Discover the possibilities Contact us
